detaileddescription.para: Convert EXIF orientation to enum video_orientation_t
If the orientation is natural or mirrored
Applies horizontal flip to an orientation
Applies vertical flip to an orientation
Applies horizontal flip to an orientation

memberdef.name: COLOR_PRIMARIES_SMTPE_240
memberdef.initializer: COLOR_PRIMARIES_BT601_525 /* Only differs from 1e10-4 in white Y */

detaileddescription.para: Top line represents top, left column left.

Initialize a video_format_t structure with chroma 'i_chroma'
p_src
pointer to video_format_t structure
i_chroma
chroma value to use

Copy video_format_t including the palette
p_dst
video_format_t to copy to
p_src
video_format_t to copy from

Cleanup and free palette of this video_format_t
p_src
video_format_t structure to clean

memberdef.argsstring: (video_format_t *, vlc_fourcc_t i_chroma, int i_width, int i_height, int i_visible_width, int i_visible_height, int i_sar_num, int i_sar_den)
memberdef.name: video_format_Setup

detaileddescription.para: It will fill up a video_format_t using the given arguments. Note that the video_format_t must already be initialized.
It will copy the crop properties from a video_format_t to another.
It will compute the crop/ar properties when scaling.

This function "normalizes" the formats orientation, by switching the a/r according to the orientation, producing a format whose orientation is ORIENT_NORMAL. It makes a shallow copy (pallette is not alloc'ed).
This function applies the transform operation to fmt.
This function applies the transforms necessary to fmt so that the resulting fmt has the dst_orientation.
Returns the operation required to transform src into dst.
This function will check if the first video format is similar to the second one.
It prints details about the given video_format_t
This function will fill all RGB shift from RGB masks.
This function will initialize a es_format_t structure.
This function will initialize a es_format_t structure from a video_format_t.
This functions will copy a es_format_t.
This function will clean up a es_format_t and release all associated resources. You can call it multiple times on the same structure.
This function will check if the first ES format is similar to the second one.
Changes ES format to another category Format must have been properly initialized
This file defines the elementary streams format types

codeline.highlight:
VLC_APIvideo_transform_t
video_format_GetTransform( video_orientation_t
src,
video_orientation_t
dst);
